## Proof of No Behavior Change

- [ ] ALL existing tests pass
- [ ] No new features smuggled in
- [ ] API contracts unchanged (same inputs, same outputs)
- [ ] ERD unchanged (no schema migration)
- [ ] ADR written in `docs/decisions/` justifying the restructure

## Post-Merge

- [ ] Architecture docs updated if structure changed significantly
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated if conventions changed
